title: Blighted Beasts
description: A mod that adds new sculk mobs to the Deep Dark
body:
Blighted Beasts adds four new mobs to the Deep Dark

 

The Reaper
----------

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/917/786/bf0a8348-8591-4cd3-9db0-12fa1a0d90ec.png)

Reapers have scythes for hands and will hunt you and any other passive mob

The Reverb
----------

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/917/787/701541b9-6f47-497c-9a45-4771ddd77c7b.png)

Reverbs are spider-like creatures that shoot projectiles when they receive a vibration

The Bloater
-----------

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/258/snapshot_8.PNG)

Bloaters are living sculk catalysts that spread the sculk when mobs die near it. They also explode into a large sculk patch if they detect you

The Seer
--------

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/259/snapshot_7.PNG)

Seers are sculkified endermen that alert all mobs in an area to your location when making eye contact. They also drop an item that allows you to harness some of their power...

 

This mod was created for the [Fight or Blight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fight-or-blight) modpack
